## Summary

A short description of the bug.

## Environment

- **Zoe version:** (run `zoe --version`)
- **Node version:** (run `node --version`)
- **OS / shell:** (e.g. macOS 14 / zsh, Windows 11 / PowerShell, Ubuntu 22.04 / bash)
- **AI model:** (e.g. `deepseek/deepseek-v4-flash`)

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened. Include the full terminal output, including any stack traces.

## Logs

If you have a log file (`.zoe/sessions/…` or terminal capture), attach it here.

## Possible cause

If you have an idea of what might be causing this, share it.

## Additional context

Anything else that might help — screenshots, links, related issues.
